summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Large Action Models (LAMs) vs Agentic LLMs: What’s the Real Difference?
raw_articles.summary:
You tell your AI “Polish my email and send it.” Same sentence, three outcomes. The gap between Large Action Models (LAMs) and agentic LLMs is one of the most practically important distinctions in AI today, and also one of the least clearly explained. In this article, we cut through the confusion through a simple breakdown […]
The post Large Action Models (LAMs) vs Agentic LLMs: What’s the Real Difference? appeared first on Analytics Vidhya.

raw_articles.title: A device that revives eyeballs from dead donors could make eye transplants possible
raw_articles.summary: It’s not easy to transplant a whole human eye. The surgery is difficult. And the eyes themselves start to degenerate as soon as they’ve left the body. raw_articles.title: Cloudflare Details Unified Data Platform Where Billing Workloads Account for 53% of Queries
raw_articles.summary: Cloudflare details Town Lake, an internal unified data platform, and Skipper, an AI analytics agent unifying access to operational, billing, security, and business data. The platform processed ~91K billing queries, with billing forming majority usage. Built on a lakehouse architecture using Trino, Iceberg, R2, and DataHub, it enables governed cross-system analytics and natural language access. By Leela Kumili
